word: H6072 - עָסַס - ʻâçaç - aw-sas' - Tread down

sections.paragraph:
Original: עסס

Transliteration: ‛âsas

Phonetic: aw-sas'

BDB Definition:

  1. to press, crush, press by treading, tread down or out, press (grapes)
    1. (Qal) to press

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1660

Part(s) of speech: Verb
